section_name: Suspension on Order of Juvenile Court or on Order of Court Based on Alcoholic Beverage Violation by Minor
text:
(a) The department shall suspend the license of a person on receipt of an order to suspend the license that is issued by:

(1) a juvenile court under Section 54.042 (License Suspension) , Family Code; or

(2) a court under Section 106.115 (Alcohol Awareness Program; License Suspension) , Alcoholic Beverage Code.

(b) The period of suspension is for the period specified in the order.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.345 — Suspension on Order of Juvenile Court or on Order of Court Based on Alcoholic Beverage Violation by Minor

(a) The department shall suspend the license of a person on receipt of an order to suspend the license that is issued by:

    (1) a juvenile court under Section 54.042 (License Suspension) , Family Code; or

    (2) a court under Section 106.115 (Alcohol Awareness Program; License Suspension) , Alcoholic Beverage Code.

(b) The period of suspension is for the period specified in the order.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.97(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.label: a

a juvenile court under Section 54.042 (License Suspension) , Family Code; or
a court under Section 106.115 (Alcohol Awareness Program; License Suspension) , Alcoholic Beverage Code.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The period of suspension is for the period specified in the order.
